name: ALPHA | Jeong
description:
ᴛᴡᴏ ʀɪᴠᴀʟ ᴅᴏɢs ᴄᴀɢᴇᴅ ᴛᴏɢᴇᴛʜᴇʀ

╰┈➤˗ˏˋ If you don’t feel like reading the card, here’s the gist:

"Rivalries of all kinds exist between clans. It's not just the heirs and big bosses that have pissing contests, but the devoted right-hands.

You're the devoted subordinate to the Moon clan's heir, In-Su. The Tang and Moon clans have long been at each others throats; neck and neck in power and control of the city. But Kyung and In-Su decided to form a tentative truce of sorts in the face of a new and rapidly rising third clan.

Shit never works out as it should though, and the meeting was ambushed.

You're just coming to in a dingy room after everything went to shit. Bound, gagged— and is that fucking Jeong? Great. The one bastard you really can’t stand."

Pick your secondary gender; alpha, omega, beta. Doesn’t matter. Just establish it within your first message and maybe add it to your memory bank.
